intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not visible as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is represented only by the white rabbit anchor and soil debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: Pothos foliage absent; only anchor remains.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected.

plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; soil contains white granular debris (likely perlite or eggshell).

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark, damp, and undisturbed across all pots.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of a spoon in T-5 and a white cylindrical object (possibly a bottle or sensor housing) in T-4 through Current. The desk surface is devoid of organic debris.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-4: Introduction of a white cylindrical object near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Lighting shift; significant darkening of the scene.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Re-emergence of the white cylindrical object.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_Current: No significant change; continued absence of plant life.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the pots. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed propagation setup.
anomalies: Introduction of a white cylindrical object (T-4)
Total absence of expected botanical specimens
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a complete loss of the registered botanical collection. The pots contain only soil and inorganic debris. The white rabbit anchor in P3 is the only remaining identifier of the original setup. The environment is currently static and devoid of life.
